INFO.name: QUERY
INFO.value: SELECT source_id, ra, dec, l, b, parallax, phot_g_mean_mag, bp_rp FROM ravedr6.dr6_x_gaiaedr3 WHERE parallax > 0 AND ra IS NOT NULL AND dec IS NOT NULL AND l IS NOT NULL AND b IS NOT NULL AND phot_g_mean_mag IS NOT NULL AND bp_rp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY parallax DESC LIMIT 150
